markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new hires to GrowthX tools, processes, and expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Onboarding is managed in Linear:** Complete all tasks in your "My Projects" board, using blue tags for Day 1 priorities. The source material is the Notion Handbook.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - **Daily Geekbot standups are mandatory:** Engineering/Ops new hires start tomorrow in the `#EPD` channel. Leah starts after onboarding is complete.
  - [**Meet your onboarding buddy today:** This is your non-manager contact for questions. Leah's is Liz; others' is Kirkland.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**Access shared tools via `team@growthxlabs.com`:** Use 1Password for credentials and the OTP.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Topics

### New Hire Introductions

  - [**Leah Myers:** Client Operations Manager, Eau Claire, WI (Central Time).](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [**Tamyres Ogasawara:** Content Ops Engineer, Brazil (Pacific Time).](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [**Sergey Kaplich:** Client Operations Engineer, New York (Pacific Time).](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [**Isaac Dudek:** Engineering Team (app dev), Los Angeles (Pacific Time).](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)

### Core Tools & Workflows

  - [**Slack:** Primary communication tool.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
      - [**Channel Naming:** `D` (Delivery) or `EXT` (External) prefixes indicate audience.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - **IT Support:** Post tool issues or access requests in `#IT-and-Tools`.
  - [**Geekbot:** Daily standups via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
      - [**Process:** Respond to the daily prompt anytime during work hours.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
      - **Routing:** Engineering/Ops replies go to `#EPD`.
  - [**Linear:** Project management tool for tracking tasks and IT tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [**Notion:** Knowledge base for documents and SOPs.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
  - [**Other Tools:**](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
      - [**Loom:** Screen recording.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
      - [**Zoom:** Meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
      - [**Fathom:** AI notetaker.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)

### Onboarding Process (Linear & Notion)

  - [**Source Material:** The Notion Handbook (`Onboarding → Company-Wide Onboarding`).](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [**Task Tracking:** Your Linear "My Projects" board mirrors the Notion content.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**Prioritization:** Blue tags → Day 1 tasks. Red tags → Week 1/2 tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
      - [**Workflow:** Complete task in Notion → Mark "Done" in Linear.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Access:** Alice granted Isaac and Sergey access during the call.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)

### Company Policies & Logistics

  - [**Work Hours:** 4-hour minimum overlap with Pacific Time.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [**PTO:** Unlimited. Block calendar with team/manager notice; no approval needed.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [**Employee Referral Program:** $10k bonus for engineering hires, $5k for non-engineering, paid after the new hire's 6-month anniversary.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [**Bi-Weekly All-Hands:** Next meeting is tomorrow. New hires will introduce themselves (name, location, fun fact).](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**All New Hires:**](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

      - [Set up `team@growthxlabs.com` in Gmail using the 1Password guide.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [Attend the bi-weekly all-hands meeting tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
      - [Review onboarding materials before your Wednesday call with Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
  - [**Leah:**](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
      - [Connect with onboarding buddy Liz.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Report daily standups in Geekbot after onboarding is complete.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [**Tamyres, Sergey, Isaac:**](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
      - [Meet with manager Daniel and onboarding buddy Kirkland today.](https://fathom.video/share/LGn2iQvsh6e4TvUd1ZeCkTsWiL9Mgm3o?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
      - Begin daily standups in the `#EPD` Geekbot channel tomorrow.
